bodyDefault: The Cardano Foundation formally announces the Cardano Ambassador Program, defining the first four roles: Meetup Organizers, Translators, Content Creators and Moderators.
After hundreds of community nominations, the Foundation publishes the first official group of Cardano Ambassadors, recognising early meetup organisers, translators and content creators.
Phase 2 of the Ambassador Program rolls out ada-denominated rewards. At rollout the program counts 58 Ambassadors across 26 countries and 28 languages.
Sustained, top-tier proposal review across multiple Catalyst funds, shaping how community funding gets allocated.
Secure Ada management lands in Ledger's flagship app, driven by an Ambassador-led Catalyst proposal.
A worldwide network of community-led Summit events extending the official program across continents.
A landmark education partnership with one of the world's largest energy companies, opening blockchain training to Petrobras engineers.
Cardano enters Argentina's largest engineering university as an official education partner.

achievement: First Cardano node at a LATAM university
bodyDefault: ALBA (Ada Labs for Blockchain Applications) brings the first university-run Cardano node online in Latin America.
A flagship developer gathering in LATAM, organised and powered by the local Ambassador community.
Ambassadors localised cardano.org into multiple languages, making the project accessible to non-English audiences.
